zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Mylde於1343年4月11日出生在英國素福爾可騰德林 霍爾時，她的父親William Mylde22歲，母親Katherine Clare22歲。她於1365年與Sir William Tendrings在英國素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1403年6月18日在英國素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德享年60歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Mylde于1343年4月11日出生在英国素福爾可騰德林 霍爾时，她的父亲William Mylde22岁，母亲Katherine Clare22岁。她于1365年与Sir William Tendrings在英国素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1403年6月18日在英国素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德享年60岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德。

nameMeanings.name: Mylde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from the farm name Molde, derived from a word meaning ‘soil rich in humus, topsoil’.
North German: metonymic occupational name from Middle Low German molde ‘oblong wooden bowl (used for baking etc.)’.
English: variant of   Mould  . This surname is rare in Britain.

variants.name: Mould
meanings: from the Middle English female personal names Mold, Moud, or Molt, shortened forms of Anglo-Norman French Mahold, a common variant of Mahald; see Maude 2.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of   Katherine  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Mylde was born on 11 April 1343, in Tendring Hall, Suffolk, England, her father, William Mylde, was 22 and her mother, Katherine Clare, was 22. She married Sir William Tendrings in 1365, in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 18 June 1403, in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England, at the age of 60, and was buried in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Mylde est née le 11 avril 1343, à Tendring Hall, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, William Mylde, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Katherine Clare, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Tendrings en 1365, à Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 18 juin 1403, à Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Mylde am 11. April 1343 in Tendring Hall, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Mylde 22 und ihre Mutter Katherine Clare 22. Sie hat 1365 in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England Sir William Tendrings geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 18. Juni 1403 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England und wurde in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Mylde è nata il il 11 aprile 1343 nel Tendring Hall, Suffolk, England, sua padre, William Mylde, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Katherine Clare, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Tendrings nel 1365, nel Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 18 giugno 1403, nel Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolta a Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Myldeが1343年4月11日にイギリススフォルクテンドリング ハルで生まれた時，父William Myldeは22歳，母Katherine Clareは22歳であった。1365年にイギリススフォルクストク ビー ナイランドでSir William Tendringsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1403年6月18日にイギリススフォルクストク ビー ナイランドで60歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクストク ビー ナイランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Mylde(이)가 1343년 4월 11일 영국 수폴크 텐드링 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Mylde(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Clare(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1365년 영국 수폴크 스토크 비 나이랜드에서 Sir William Tendrings(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1403년 6월 18일 영국 수폴크 스토크 비 나이랜드에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 스토크 비 나이랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Mylde nasceu em 11 de abril de 1343, em Tendring Hall, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Mylde, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Clare, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Tendrings em 1365, em Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 18 de junho de 1403, em Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Mylde родилась 11 апреля 1343 г. в местности тендринг холл, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени William Mylde было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Katherine Clare, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Tendrings в 1365 г. в местности сток би неиланд, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 18 июня 1403 г. в местности сток би неиланд, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности сток би неиланд, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine Mylde nació el 11 de abril de 1343, en Tendring Hall, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, William Mylde, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Katherine Clare, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Sir William Tendrings en 1365, en Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 18 de junio de 1403, en Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
